prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood textures, cinematic lighting. Yuna Emberlane, an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket with messenger straps, steadies a metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Ironleaf, a feminine ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf-shaped brooch, carefully guides a small, non-sparking repair tool along the shield's edge. Cooperative hands, focused expressions, steady camera, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot. Yuna Emberlane maintains a steady grip on the shield while Yuna Ironleaf completes the repair, tapping the final mark on the shield surface with her tool. Both agents share a brief, friendly nod of teamwork. Warm forge atmosphere, consistent character appearances, no sparks, no text, no watermark.
